title: API Fuzzer + Proprietary Reachability Analyzer — Live Endpoint Coverage
description: test_proprietary_analyzer_unit.py and test_api_fuzzer.py sit in the same community as the API security test suite. The OpenAPI parser extracts v3 endpoints (method + path) but the fuzzer only sends static payloads. The proprietary analyzer does AST-based reachability but does not consume the OpenAPI-extracted endpoint list as its target surface.
missing: Wire APIFuzzer to consume OpenAPI endpoint list from api_discovery_engine.py so newly discovered endpoints are automatically added to the fuzz target set
Implement mutation-based fuzzing: derive payloads from OpenAPI schema constraints (maxLength, pattern, enum) to generate boundary-condition inputs
Feed fuzzer findings into api_abuse_detection_engine.py so confirmed vulnerable endpoints get runtime abuse-detection rules auto-applied
